goal: Find one or more new orthogonal specialist signals or conditioning layers that work primarily where the base does not trade, use genuinely new information, pass window stability, and prove additive value through new entries upon integration.
global_constraints: Base active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — no re-tuning, no hour/day/threshold variations, no cosmetic changes.
Raw single-filter event entries (H1/H2 style) are permanently forbidden.
Every new candidate must first pass complement-first mode (base_absent surface) before any other evaluation.
Every prototype must contain at least 3 logical layers: new information layer + regime confirmation + density limiter.
Model-first approaches are forbidden until the low-friction wave (Wave A) completes.
No candidate may be a renamed variation of existing hour, dow, cl_*, rsi, iv_est static, or day-of-week patterns.
If permissive integration looks good but strict additive is weak — reject for hidden cannibalism.
Record both successes and reasons for rejection in research journal.

slices.title: Feature contract and custom feature publication for Wave A
slices.hypothesis: Translate hypotheses into correct causal features, not verbal ideas, and publish them through the feature pipeline.
slices.objective: Translate hypotheses into correct causal features, not verbal ideas, and publish them through the feature pipeline.
success_criteria: All Wave A features are published and verified for causality and materialization.
evidence_requirements: All Wave A features are published and verified for causality and materialization.

slices.title: Hypothesis plausibility on base-absent surface
slices.hypothesis: Perform early triage not on the whole market but specifically inside the base complement surface.
slices.objective: Perform early triage not on the whole market but specifically inside the base complement surface.
success_criteria: Only plausibility-approved prototypes remain, each showing structure specifically where the base is absent.
evidence_requirements: Only plausibility-approved prototypes remain, each showing structure specifically where the base is absent.

slices.title: Build strict specialist prototypes
slices.hypothesis: Convert surviving ideas into real signals with at least three logical layers, avoiding the H1/H2 mistake of weak single-filter architecture.
slices.objective: Convert surviving ideas into real signals with at least three logical layers, avoiding the H1/H2 mistake of weak single-filter architecture.
success_criteria: A small set of strict specialist prototypes exists, not a loose grid of weak filters.
evidence_requirements: A small set of strict specialist prototypes exists, not a loose grid of weak filters.
